metadata.author: Crystal Implementation
metadata.bugit: if [ -f .bugit/chess_engine.cr.bak ]; then echo 'bugit already active for crystal'; else mkdir -p .bugit && cp src/chess_engine.cr .bugit/chess_engine.cr.bak && printf '\n)\n' >> src/chess_engine.cr; fi
metadata.fix: if [ -f .bugit/chess_engine.cr.bak ]; then mv .bugit/chess_engine.cr.bak src/chess_engine.cr && rmdir .bugit 2>/dev/null || true; else echo 'no crystal bugit backup to restore'; fi

move e7e5
export
